title: Digital's Better Swords
description: A texture pack that improves the appearance of swords by remaking them in 3D.
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fff92770570a8b8c6c71ba2186c642d78fe1f8c3.png)

Transform your Minecraft experience with **Digital's Better Swords**, the ultimate texture pack that takes your weapons to a new dimension. Each sword has been meticulously redesigned in glorious 3D, offering a more striking aesthetic and unprecedented immersion. With **Digital's Better Swords**, you will feel the power of every blow and see your duels come to life like never before. Prepare to dazzle your enemies and allies alike with swords that are not only tools of battle but true works of art.
